semantic.role: Declares detected file extensions and available language support for the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibilities: File type detection based on registered extensions
invariants: schemaVersion must be 1 (no other versions defined)
detectedExtensions must be an array of unique file extensions
Each language entry must specify extensions and status

English.role: Declares detected file extensions and available language support for the ArchSpine mirror system.

parameter_definitions.schemaVersion: Defines the version of the configuration schema; currently locked to 1.
parameter_definitions.detectedExtensions: List of file extensions that the system recognizes, affecting file indexing and processing.
parameter_definitions.languages: Map of programming languages with their associated extensions and availability status. Determines language-specific tooling and analysis.
parameter_definitions.languages.typescript.extensions: File extensions registered for TypeScript (only .ts). Controls TypeScript file detection.
parameter_definitions.languages.typescript.status: Indicates whether TypeScript support is available ('available' or 'unavailable'). Enables or disables TypeScript features.

English.stability_and_risks: Incorrect extension lists may cause files to be missed or misclassified. Language status mismatches could enable unsupported features or disable required ones. Schema version must be strictly 1 to avoid parsing failures.

Simplified Chinese.role: 声明ArchSpine镜像系统检测到的文件扩展名和可用的语言支持。

parameter_definitions.schemaVersion: 定义配置模式的版本；当前固定为1。
parameter_definitions.detectedExtensions: 系统识别的文件扩展名列表，影响文件索引和处理。
parameter_definitions.languages: 编程语言的映射，包含关联的扩展名和可用状态。决定语言特定的工具和分析。
parameter_definitions.languages.typescript.extensions: 为TypeScript注册的文件扩展名（仅.ts）。控制TypeScript文件检测。
parameter_definitions.languages.typescript.status: 指示TypeScript支持是否可用（'available'或'unavailable'）。启用或禁用TypeScript功能。

Simplified Chinese.stability_and_risks: 不正确的扩展名列表可能导致文件被遗漏或分类错误。语言状态不匹配可能启用不支持的功能或禁用必需的功能。模式版本必须严格为1，以避免解析失败。
